evidence_summary: Round-237 stays inside the selected milestone-6 closeout slice, retires the redundant PreparedGeneralizationArtifact.pgaAcyclicBaseConstraint shim, recovers the prepared base graph through GaBindParents.gaBaseConstraint on the existing generalization/result-type lane, preserves the accepted owner-local seams for mixed NodeRef storage, directional phase transitions, and mkUncheckedInstanceWitness, aligns AGENTS.md, docs/architecture.md, and CHANGELOG.md with that accepted type-level safety contract, leaves src-public unchanged, passes git diff --check, focused guard and prepared-artifact behavior selectors, and cabal build all && cabal test with 2573 examples and 0 failures. No semantic roadmap update is needed, so status-only closeout should move milestone-6 from pending to done; because milestone-6 is the final unfinished milestone, the active roadmap becomes terminal once the controller applies that closeout.
